title: Hyper-realistic cinematic photograph of man and powerful horse
description: A highly detailed prompt for generating a hyper-realistic cinematic photograph of a powerful, athletic man walking beside an exceptionally tall, muscular horse in a rugged landscape. It emphasizes anatomical realism, natural motion physics (dust, rope sway), golden hour lighting, and anti-AI realism
content:
A hyper-realistic cinematic color photograph of a powerful, athletic man walking through a wide open rugged landscape beside an exceptionally tall, powerful horse. The horse is noticeably larger than average, long-legged, heavy-boned, and imposing, with a deep chest, thick neck, broad shoulders, and clearly defined muscle structure beneath its coat. Its presence feels dominant and majestic, yet calm and controlled. The man holds a thick rope lead in his hand, the rope showing natural weight, tension, and slight sway as they walk in sync.

The man is topless, revealing a dense, naturally muscular upper body with realistic proportions: thick veiny arms, pronounced triceps and deltoids, broad shoulders, and subtle asymmetry created by real motion. Muscle compression, tendon tension, and skin stretch are visible and believable. Tattoos on the upper arm and forearm appear authentic, aged, and embedded naturally into the skin, deforming correctly with movement.

He walks forward with grounded confidence and quiet authority, posture relaxed but commanding, as if fully accustomed to handling such a powerful animal. His expression is calm, hardened, and focused, eyes looking ahead or slightly downward, never at the camera. Facial features are rugged and masculine with a strong jawline, thick uneven beard, realistic pores, fine lines, and a light sheen of sweat. Hair is dark, imperfect, and lightly disturbed by wind.

The horse walks slightly ahead or shoulder-to-shoulder with him, reinforcing its size and power. Its anatomy is accurate and lifelike, hooves kicking up dust with each step. Dust clouds rise around their legs, catching sunlight in soft golden particles. Wind moves through the scene, lifting dust, mane hair, loose rope fibers, and subtly brushing across the man’s skin, adding authentic motion.

The environment is a vast, open landscape — dry earth, rolling terrain, distant hills, sparse vegetation — grounded and real, never stylized. The color palette is cinematic but natural: warm earth tones, sunlit browns, muted greens, realistic sky blues, and gentle highlight roll-off. No oversaturation, no fantasy hues. Lighting feels like late afternoon or golden hour, directional and organic, sculpting muscle and form while preserving shadow detail.

Captured like a high-end documentary or editorial photograph using a full-frame camera with a fast prime lens. Natural depth of field, subtle motion blur in legs, dust, and rope, realistic film grain, optical imperfections, and imperfect focus falloff. The image feels candid, powerful, and timeless — not posed, not staged.

Anti-AI realism emphasis: believable scale difference, real anatomy, authentic motion physics, natural dust behavior, organic color grading, imperfect lighting, realistic skin and hair texture.",

title: Cinematic 3x2 storyboard grid from a single image reference
description: A complex, multi-step prompt designed to generate a cinematic 3x2 storyboard grid (6 frames) from a single uploaded photograph (Jennifer Lawrence). It requires preserving the subject's identity and environment while varying the camera angles (Wide, Medium, Low-angle, Close-up, Dynamic, Final Shot) t
content:
Use the uploaded photograph as the only visual reference.
The person’s identity must be preserved with maximum accuracy: face, facial features, age, gender, body proportions, and overall appearance must remain unchanged.
Do not invent or add anything that does not exist in the original image.

Step 1: Detailed visual analysis of the source image
First, perform a careful visual analysis of the uploaded image, including:
Who is in the image (person, number of people, position in frame)
Body pose and direction of gaze
Facial expression and emotional mood
Clothing and accessories
Lighting conditions, time of day, color temperature
Environment, background, and depth of space
Overall emotional tone of the scene

Step 2: Cinematic 3×2 storyboard grid
After the analysis, create a cinematic 3×2 grid (6 frames) from the single image, as if it were a sequence of shots from a film.

Global requirements for the entire grid:
Format: one image containing a 3×2 grid
All frames must be numbered 1–6, left to right, top to bottom
Visual style: realistic, cinematic, non-illustrative
One consistent character and environment with logical continuity
Each frame must differ by pose, camera angle, or camera distance
The sequence should feel like time is passing and the scene is developing
No facial distortion, no change in identity or appearance

Frame descriptions:

Frame 1 (No. 1)
Wide establishing shot.
The camera is farthest from the subject, showing the full environment and context.
The person feels like part of the surrounding space.

Frame 2 (No. 2)
Medium shot.
The camera moves closer.
The pose changes slightly, revealing inner emotion or state of mind.

Frame 3 (No. 3)
Low-angle or side-angle shot.
Adds drama or tension, emphasizing body shape and perspective.

Frame 4 (No. 4)
Close-up or medium close-up.
Focus on the face, eyes, and emotion.
Fine details are clearly visible.

Frame 5 (No. 5)
Dynamic angle: diagonal composition or camera movement.
The pose changes the most, creating a sense of action or momentum.

Frame 6 (No. 6)
Final shot.
Calm, reflective, or emotionally resolved.
The camera may be closer or farther, but the frame feels like a conclusion.

Lighting & cinematic consistency:
Lighting must remain logically consistent across all frames, as if filmed in one continuous scene.

Depth of field, lighting, and color grading should reinforce a cinematic look.

Final result:
The output should resemble a professional cinematic storyboard, captured in a single take and location, with strong realism and narrative flow.

content:
A medium shot of four famous actresses, {argument name="actress 1" default="Ana de Armas"}, {argument name="actress 2" default="Millie Bobby Brown"}, {argument name="actress 3" default="Sadie Sink"}, and {argument name="actress 4" default="Sydney Sweeney"}, posing together on a sun-drenched tropical beach. They are arranged in a tiered group composition: Sadie Sink is on the left in the foreground making a peace sign and winking; Sydney Sweeney is kneeling in the front right smiling at the camera; Ana de Armas and Millie Bobby Brown stand behind them, smiling warmly.

Wardrobe & Styling
 * Outfits: Casual summer beachwear. Ribbed tank tops in vibrant primary colors (cobalt blue, bright yellow, crisp white, and black) tucked into light-wash high-waisted denim jeans and cargo-style denim pants.
 * Accessories: Minimalist gold jewelry, including small hoop earrings, thin chain necklaces, and several gold and silver wristwatches/bracelets.
 * Hair: Natural summer styles—Sadie with long wavy red hair; Sydney and Millie with sleek, slicked-back ponytails; Ana with soft, layered brunette hair.
Environment & Lighting
 * Setting: A pristine white sand beach with turquoise ocean waves gently lapping the shore in the background. Several tall, leaning coconut palm trees frame the top of the shot against a clear, pale blue sky.
 * Lighting: Bright, natural golden-hour sunlight coming from the side, creating soft highlights on their skin and a warm, glowing atmosphere.
 * Camera Style: Shot on a high-end digital camera (35mm lens), f/2.8 aperture for a slight soft-focus blur on the distant background, sharp focus on the subjects' faces, 8k resolution, cinematic color grading.
Technical Observations
While the image looks very convincing at a glance, it contains several classic AI artifacts that you might want to "prompt out" or fix in future versions:
 * Extra Fingers: Look closely at the hand on Sadie’s shoulder; there are extra digits blending into her hair.
 * Anatomical Merging: The way the arms and torsos overlap in the center is slightly physically impossible.
 * Watch Details: The watches have distorted faces/bands typical of AI-generated text and metal.

现代极简风格的详细建筑平面图插画，与参考相匹配。俯视图住宅布局，标注客厅、餐厅、开放式厨房、卧室、门厅、阳台、凸窗和流线。米色和暖灰色调，清晰线条，柔和阴影，微妙纹理，室内设计演示风格。专业建筑可视化，平面蓝图美学，家具布局清晰。

平面图所示客厅的超逼真室内摄影。客厅家具齐全，空间布局精确对应平面图：{argument name="家具组合" default="弧形沙发组合、中央茶几、柔和地毯、温暖木地板、中性墙面、大窗户自然采光"}。现代、舒适、当代室内设计，土色调，柔和光线，逼真材质和生活细节。

右半应如真实室内照片，左半保持清晰建筑图纸。两部分视觉对齐，清晰展示'概念对比现实'。

风格与氛围

建筑可视化遇见真实室内摄影
现代、温暖、优雅住宅设计
简洁、专业、设计工作室呈现
从概念到实现的对比

光影与色彩

左：平均光照、中性色调
右：自然日光、柔和阴影、温暖高光
平面图与房间色彩和谐统一

镜头与技术细节

左：俯视正交视图
右：室内广角镜头、眼平视角
高分辨率、细节清晰、逼真纹理

反向提示：
卡通风格、低细节、杂乱室内、布局不符、不现实比例、生硬光线、夸张色彩、文字叠加、水印

title: Outfit Swapping Workflow with Reference Images
description: A description of a workflow using Gemini 3 and Nano Banana Pro to maintain character identity while iteratively swapping outfits. The initial prompt changes the clothing based on a reference image, and subsequent iterations use the newly generated image as the base for further outfit changes.
content:
I started with two reference images and a simple first prompt:
" Change the clothes of the woman to the {argument name="new outfit" default="yellow and green outfit"}, keep her face the same" 

Once I had that result, I reused the generated image as the new base. 
I added a fresh outfit reference and kept the prompt structure identical, only changing the outfit name:

"Change outfit to [NAME] outfit"

title: Cinematic Football Skill and Goal Animation Prompt
description: A detailed motion prompt for an AI video generator (Kling) describing a dramatic football sequence: a player dribbling past Cristiano Ronaldo with rapid footwork, culminating in a goal, cinematic camera shakes, slow-motion effects, and ending with a celebratory exchange of jerseys.
content:
Motion prompt: The man begins dribbling the ball forward at speed. The camera switches to a slightly wider tracking shot, following his movement smoothly while introducing light horizontal camera shake from simulated shoulder-mounted broadcast footage.
Cristiano Ronaldo closes in aggressively to defend. As Ronaldo steps forward, the man performs rapid footwork—quick step-overs, a sudden body feint, and a sharp lateral cut.
At the exact moment he beats Ronaldo, the camera adds a short, intense impact shake to emphasize the skill move, followed by a fast push-in zoom.
The crowd volume spikes. Motion blur subtly increases on the legs and ball while the upper body stays sharp. The camera briefly shifts to a low-angle tracking shot, enhancing speed and dominance.
He accelerates toward the goal. As he strikes the ball, the camera performs a cinematic whip-pan, followed by a brief slow-motion beat at the moment of contact.
A strong vertical camera shake occurs as the ball rockets into the net, simulating crowd eruption and stadium vibration.
GOAL MOMENT (7s–8.5s):
The net ripples dramatically. Stadium lights flare slightly. Fans jump and wave scarves. The camera transitions into a subtle celebratory shake, as if the operator is reacting emotionally. Ronaldo turns back, smiling with admiration and respect.
END FRAME (8.5s–10s):
Transition smoothly into the provided final image.
Cristiano Ronaldo walks toward the man and hands him his Real Madrid jersey, clearly showing Ronaldo’s name and number 7 on the back. Both are smiling, breathing heavily, sharing a victorious moment. Camera stabilizes gradually, ending with a clean, steady cinematic frame under glowing stadium lights.
